title: Frank Gehry
content: Frank Owen Gehry,, FAIA (; born Frank Owen Goldberg;) is a Canadian-born American architect and designer, residing in Los Angeles. A number of his buildings, including his private residence, have become world-renowned attractions. His works are cited as being among the most important works of contemporary architecture in the 2010 World Architecture Survey, which led "Vanity Fair" to label him as "the most important architect of our age".
